{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Forger binding
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon's shield]] has a protective [[Forger binding]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20">''Uncrowned'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
